summary: Phase 3 (role-based auth + Intern Portal + members directory + manual badges + project-linked tasks/chat) fully verified end-to-end. BACKEND: 23/23 new pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py covering: role-aware login for all 4 roles (admin/manager/team_member/intern), /api/me/intern profile fetch, intern task list + PATCH→completed auto-awards 'On-Time Achiever' badge (verified before/after badge sets), POST /me/intern/documents x5 triggers 'Document Diligence' badge, GET /documents lists required+submitted WITHOUT content_base64 leak, /documents/{type}/download returns real base64 (round-trip decoded == original bytes), /progress returns summary+suggestions+pending+badges, /progress/pdf returns >1KB real PDF (%PDF magic bytes, application/pdf content-type), /members/directory returns all users with password_hash stripped, /me/award-badge succeeds as manager/admin, 403 as intern. Old regression endpoints (projects/tasks/interns/chat/ai) still 200. FRONTEND: Intern login redirects to /intern/dashboard (NOT /app/dashboard). Admin/manager/member redirect to /app/dashboard. Intern manually visiting /app/dashboard redirected back to /intern/dashboard. Intern sidebar shows 6 items (Dashboard/My Tasks/My Documents/My Badges/Chat/AI Assist) with 'INTERN PORTAL' gradient ribbon. Dashboard renders 3D growth chart hero with trophy, 'Download progress report (PDF)' button, 100% on-time rate badge, 4 KPI cards (Completed/Pending/Overdue/Badges), suggestions list, achievements gallery with all 4 earned badges (On-Time Achiever, Document Diligence, TEST_Manager Choice, TEST_Admin Star). /intern/tasks lists 'TEST_Phase3 Task' with assigned/in_progress/submitted/completed status dropdown. /intern/documents shows all 5 slots (BANK/PAN/ID/ADDR/CV) with 'Submitted' status, file name, timestamp, Download + Re-upload buttons. /intern/badges shows earned + locked catalog (5 badge categories: TIME/COMM/DOCS/PRO/CHMP). Admin Chat sidebar shows 'TEAMMATES' directory with all members listed. Admin Tasks 'New Task' modal exposes Project dropdown (— None — by default). Portal footer 'Developed by Projexino Solutions Pvt Ltd · © 2026 Projexino. All rights reserved.' now rendered on every portal/intern page (iteration_3 gap fixed).
critical_code_review_comments: self_service.py (590 lines) cleanly registers all /me/intern/* and /me/award-badge + /members/directory endpoints on the same ext_router. Strips _id and password_hash from responses. Good.
PDF builder (_build_progress_pdf) uses reportlab with custom HeroBanner + StatBar Flowables and structured tables — produces real >1KB application/pdf binary verified server-side.
Role check on /me/award-badge correctly returns 403 for non-admin/manager (verified live).
ProtectedRoute internOnly prop correctly redirects intern users hitting /app/* back to /intern/dashboard (verified live).
Login.jsx role-based redirect uses localStorage pj_role with 50ms setTimeout — fragile but works. Consider passing role directly from login() return value rather than re-reading localStorage.
Intern profile auto-link via $or[linked_user_id, email] is robust against either seeding path.
Auto-badge awarding logic for On-Time Achiever and Document Diligence is idempotent (checks 'already_has' before appending).

PDF download button in InternDashboard.jsx triggers a fetch+blob flow rather than a direct <a download> href; backend works (curl/pytest verified) but Playwright's expect_download() event does not fire — not a user-facing bug, just a testing nuance.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py (new — 23 tests covering role login, members directory, intern self-service end-to-end, manual badges, regression)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every checklist item from review_request verified in live browser including intern redirect, 6 nav items, INTERN PORTAL ribbon, 4 KPI cards, 3D hero+trophy, all 5 doc slots submitted, earned+locked badges, intern blocked from /app/*, admin redirect, chat Teammates directory, Tasks Project dropdown, portal footer

test_credentials: admin@projexino.com/Projexino@2026, manager@projexino.com/Manager@2026, member@projexino.com/Member@2026, intern@projexino.com/Intern@2026 — all verified live
seed_data_creation: Created 1 intern task ('TEST_Phase3 Task <hex>') for the seeded intern via admin API, then completed it through intern self-service to verify on-time badge. Also submitted 5 base64 placeholder docs and awarded 2 manual badges (TEST_Manager Choice, TEST_Admin Star). All test data prefixed TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v (≈83 tests total: backend_test.py 30 + test_extensions.py 30 + test_phase3.py 23). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be exported from frontend/.env before pytest. For Playwright UI login, use keyboard.type + Enter on the password field — page.click on submit-btn alone does not always trigger React form submit in headless. The intern account's badges now include TEST_-prefixed manual badges from phase3 tests; teardown cleanup not implemented (low impact since seed runs idempotently). PDF download UI button uses fetch+blob — to verify download in Playwright, hit /api/me/intern/progress/pdf directly with the bearer token instead.
rca of the issue: No outstanding issues. Phase 3 implementation matches spec exactly — role-based redirect, dedicated intern portal at /intern/*, self-service endpoints, auto-badge rules, manual badge guard, members directory, project-linked tasks and chat all working in production preview URL.
